Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Jew appeared via zoom for Lupe Amataga (petitioner).

Mr. Jew request a 3-week continuance. The matter is continued to October 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Sep-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew appeared by zoom for Lupe Amataga (petitioner).

The court asked for an update. Mr. Jew requested a 90-day continuance stating that there is the issue of three heirs who post deceased the decedent, that there are fourteen heirs under them, that he sent out information regarding small estate affidavits, that one family hired an attorney, and that one family is almost ready. Status on close of estate is continued to September 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the estate is not ready for final distribution, Mr. Jew is to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration one week prior.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
